2604.14144.title: SpatialEvo: Self-Evolving Spatial Intelligence via Deterministic Geometric Environments
2604.14144.paper_summary: Spatial reasoning over three-dimensional scenes is a core capability for embodied intelligence, yet continuous model improvement remains bottlenecked by the cost of geometric annotation. The self-evolving paradigm offers a promising path, but its reliance on model consensus to construct pseudo-labels causes training to reinforce rather than correct the model's own geometric errors. We identify a property unique to 3D spatial reasoning that circumvents this limitation: ground truth is a deterministic consequence of the underlying geometry, computable exactly from point clouds and camera poses without any model involvement. Building on this insight, we present SpatialEvo, a self-evolving framework for 3D spatial reasoning, centered on the Deterministic Geometric Environment (DGE). The DGE formalizes 16 spatial reasoning task categories under explicit geometric validation rules and converts unannotated 3D scenes into zero-noise interactive oracles, replacing model consensus with objective physical feedback. A single shared-parameter policy co-evolves across questioner and solver roles under DGE constraints: the questioner generates physically valid spatial questions grounded in scene observations, while the solver derives precise answers against DGE-verified ground truth. A task-adaptive scheduler endogenously concentrates training on the model's weakest categories, producing a dynamic curriculum without manual design. Experiments across nine benchmarks demonstrate that SpatialEvo achieves the highest average score at both 3B and 7B scales, with consistent gains on spatial reasoning benchmarks and no degradation on general visual understanding.
2604.14144.paper_summary_zh: 三維場景的空間推理是具身智慧的一項核心能力，然而持續的模型改進仍然受到幾何標註成本的瓶頸。自我演進的範式提供了一條有希望的道路，但其依賴模型共識來構建偽標籤的做法，導致訓練強化而非修正模型自身的幾何錯誤。我們識別出一個獨特於三維空間推理的特性，繞過了這一限制：真實情況是底層幾何的確定性結果，可以從點雲和相機姿態精確計算出來，而不需要任何模型的參與。基於這一見解，我們提出了SpatialEvo，一個針對三維空間推理的自我演進框架，圍繞確定性幾何環境（DGE）展開。DGE在明確的幾何驗證規則下，對16個空間推理任務類別進行了形式化，並將未標註的三維場景轉換為零噪聲的互動神諭，以客觀的物理反饋取代模型共識。單一的共享參數策略在DGE約束下在提問者和解答者角色之間共同演進：提問者生成基於場景觀察的物理有效空間問題，而解答者則針對DGE驗證的真實情況得出精確答案。一個任務自適應的調度器內生地集中訓練於模型最弱的類別，產生一個動態課程，而無需手動設計。在九個基準測試中的實驗表明，SpatialEvo在3B和7B規模下都達到了最高的平均分數，在空間推理基準上持續獲得增益，且在一般視覺理解上沒有退化。
2604.14144.author: Dinging Li et.al.
2604.14144.authors: Dinging Li, Yingxiu Zhao, Xinrui Cheng, Kangheng Lin, Hongbo Peng, Hongxing Li, Zixuan Wang, Yuhong Dai, Haodong Li, Jia Wang, Yukang Shi, Liang Zhao, Jianjian Sun, Zheng Ge, Xiangyu Zhang, Weiming Lu, Jun Xiao, Yueting Zhuang, Yongliang Shen
